title: SQL injection vulnerability in data access layer
description: Inject SQL injection vulnerability by concatenating user input directly into SQL queries without parameterization

mutation.description: Replace parameterized query with string concatenation

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect SQL injection vulnerability and recommend parameterized queries

title: Cross-site scripting in user input rendering
description: Allow unescaped user input to be rendered in HTML without proper sanitization

mutation.description: Remove HTML escaping from user input display

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect XSS vulnerability and recommend input sanitization

title: Authentication bypass through session management flaw
description: Implement flawed session validation that allows bypassing authentication checks

mutation.description: Introduce logic error in session validation that accepts invalid tokens

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect authentication bypass vulnerability

title: Cryptographic key exposure in configuration
description: Store cryptographic keys in plaintext configuration files instead of secure vaults

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect exposed cryptographic materials

title: Insecure deserialization vulnerability
description: Use unsafe deserialization that allows code execution through crafted input

mutation.description: Replace safe deserialization with eval-based parsing

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect insecure deserialization vulnerability
